title: Bersama paullinioides
taxonomy: Bersama paullinioides is classified within the family Simaroubaceae, which is a family of flowering plants. This plant belongs to the genus Bersama, a group of plants native to tropical Africa. Bersama paullinioides is further classified as a species within the genus, sharing characteristics with other species in the same genus. uses: Bersama paullinioides has been traditionally used in folk medicine in various parts of its range, particularly in tropical Africa. Its leaves and stems are employed in the treatment of various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In some cultures, it is also used to manage issues related to the reproductive system and as an antiseptic agent.
